players.name: Mushi
strengths: Great job pushing pace on transition (passing early or running early)
Amazing job splitting defense driving down middle or driving corner baseline and dumping to cutting bigs
Good open shots were taken they just wasn't falling
improvements: Forced a few passes to inside bigs while too congested
Sometimes take a look before driving middle (sometimes they overhelped and had ALL of their 3 backline players (2-3 zone) narrow in paint)

players.name: Emanuel
strengths: Great job creating paint touches to bigs inside (high or low post)
Good job swinging ball fast / early
improvements: Sometimes a bit more effort needed boxing out or helping guards contest 45 degree shooters
More drives needed (only penetrated defense 3 time) + take more inside floaters shots if 3pt isn't falling

players.name: Vong
strengths: Good job cutting / rolling getting inside / finishing
improvements: Vary up your inside moves (pump fakes etc) + don't always settle for push shot
On defense pay more attention to backdoor and inside cutters
At high or low post, SEAL the man and be ready for pass at all times
Coordinate sides/post position with Alex more

players.name: Matt
strengths: Good job driving corner and dumping
Good job passing early on fastbreaks / floater early rather than contested layup
improvements: Need to rotate/communicate more to contest open shooters, especially while they are hot
When on the wing, watch out for when top man of 2-3 comes across to you = double team between him and the low man of 2-3 zone. Pass back central or inside EARLY as soon as you see man coming across

players.name: Alex
strengths: Good job screening and rolling for the dump inside
improvements: On offensive boards, either jump/contest for the board, or IMMEDIATELY drop back

COORDINATE positions with VONG when playing a a 2-3 Zone. Against a 2-3 ZONE, we need 1 big at the CENTRE of the high post (NOT THE ELBOW), and another big at the LOW post. Too many times you were at the elbow standing/hiding behind guard, or you and Vong were both low, or both high)

players.name: Team
improvements: Don't take contested pull up 3s early into the shot clock
Don't bring your man to the ball handler unless setting a screen or handoff
